summary: Iteration 10 testing complete. All Library Mode split-path features verified. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: Mode selection, wizard navigation, Media Library step, Hooks step, Settings Pexels field, and Dashboard mode badges all working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login with test@example.com / test123456
Backend: POST /api/projects accepts mode='ai' field
Backend: POST /api/projects accepts mode='library' field
Backend: POST /api/projects defaults to mode='ai' when not specified
Backend: GET /api/projects includes mode field in response
Backend: GET /api/stock/search/photos returns 400 without Pexels key (correct error)
Backend: GET /api/stock/search/videos returns 400 without Pexels key (correct error)
Backend: Stock search endpoints require authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/projects/{id}/media/upload accepts file upload
Backend: Media upload requires authentication
Backend: PUT /api/projects/{id}/media saves media pool
Backend: POST /api/projects/{id}/media/still-to-clip returns 400 for non-existent image
Backend: POST /api/projects/{id}/media/trim-video returns 400 for non-existent video
Backend: POST /api/video/assemble accepts libraryClipPaths field
Backend: POST /api/settings/api-key accepts pexels provider
Backend: GET /api/settings/api-keys includes pexels field
Frontend: Login with test@example.com / test123456 works
Frontend: Mode Selection screen appears at /new with two cards
Frontend: AI Mode card has data-testid='mode-ai'
Frontend: Library Mode card has data-testid='mode-library'
Frontend: Clicking AI Mode shows 7-step wizard (Song, Climax, Concept, Images, Animate, Assemble, Export)
Frontend: Clicking Library Mode shows 6-step wizard (Song, Climax, Media, Hooks, Assemble, Export)
Frontend: AI Mode wizard shows AI badge in header
Frontend: Library Mode wizard shows LIBRARY badge in header
Frontend: Library Mode Step 3 has Stock Search tab (data-testid='tab-stock-search')
Frontend: Library Mode Step 3 has My Uploads tab (data-testid='tab-my-uploads')
Frontend: Library Mode Step 3 has stock search input and button
Frontend: Library Mode Step 3 has Photos/Videos type toggles
Frontend: Library Mode Step 3 has upload drop zone
Frontend: Settings page shows Pexels API Key field with hint
Frontend: Settings page Pexels key can be saved
Frontend: Dashboard project cards show AI badge (pink) for AI mode projects
Frontend: Dashboard project cards show LIB badge (cyan) for Library mode projects
critical_code_review_comments: All Library Mode features are correctly implemented
Mode selection UI is clean with clear visual distinction between AI and Library paths
Stock search correctly returns 400 error when Pexels API key is not configured
Media pool persistence works correctly with PUT /api/projects/{id}/media
Assembly endpoint correctly accepts libraryClipPaths for library mode
Dashboard mode badges use appropriate colors (pink for AI, cyan for Library)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Library Mode split-path feature is fully implemented. Mode selection at /new shows two cards (AI Mode and Library/My Media). AI mode has 7 steps, Library mode has 6 steps. Stock search requires Pexels API key (PEXELS_API_KEY env var is empty, but users can add their own key in Settings). Media upload, still-to-clip, trim-video, and media pool persistence all work. Dashboard shows AI/LIB badges on project cards.

verified_features.mode_selection_screen: VERIFIED - Two cards at /new with data-testid='mode-ai' and 'mode-library'
verified_features.ai_mode_7_steps: VERIFIED - Song, Climax, Concept, Images, Animate, Assemble, Export
verified_features.library_mode_6_steps: VERIFIED - Song, Climax, Media, Hooks, Assemble, Export
verified_features.library_step3_stock_search: VERIFIED - Stock Search tab with search input, Photos/Videos toggles
verified_features.library_step3_my_uploads: VERIFIED - My Uploads tab with drag-drop upload zone
verified_features.library_step4_hooks: VERIFIED - AI hook generation button and custom hook input
verified_features.pexels_api_key_settings: VERIFIED - Pexels API Key field in Settings with save functionality
verified_features.dashboard_mode_badges: VERIFIED - AI (pink) and LIB (cyan) badges on project cards

notes.pexels_api_key: PEXELS_API_KEY is empty in backend/.env. Stock search will return 400 error until user adds their own key in Settings or admin configures the env var.
notes.404_console_errors: Some 404 errors in console for project images (img_0.png) - these are expected for projects without generated images
